heading: Omitted
label: 640d–19 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for perpetual use of Cliff Spring by the Hopi Tribe as a shrine for religious ceremonial purposes, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 93–531, § 2088 Stat. 1722Dec. 22, 1974
